title: Adventure & Wizards & Structory
description: Modpack mods where you go through different dungeons, villages, structures in search of loot and adventures! There is a LevelZ mod here that will make your adventure a bit more hardcore.
body:
This modpack adds an adventurous spirit to Minecraft without overloading the game. Explore 6 thematic dimensions and master a simple but effective cooking system. No unnecessary difficulties — just a clean gameplay.
Unique measurements! Each dimension is a new territory to explore with your opponents and rewards. I have selected the best so that you don't get lost in hundreds of identical worlds.
Easy and healthy cooking: new products and recipes have been added. Cooked food gives you tangible buffs that help you travel and fight. Progress through Loot: Your power depends on the equipment you find and the bosses you defeat, not on leveling up your skills. Everything is simple and intuitive.
You immediately know what to do. Stability: A small number of mods ensures high performance and minimal conflicts. Perfect for a leisurely game: collect resources, cook food, explore worlds at your own pace.
This is my first shared modpack, so it may contain bugs and conflicts.
